creator: ovip1985@yahoo.com
text:
Hi
I'm tried to update samba
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=157513

I tried to apply the patch but i have this error




patch -p1 < patch.txt
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|
|diff -urN /usr/ports/net/samba35/Makefile samba35/Makefile
|--- /usr/ports/net/samba35/Makefile    2011-02-24 20:32:01.000000000 -0500
|+++ samba35/Makefile   2011-06-01 19:06:28.000000000 -0400
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 6.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 73.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -urN /usr/ports/net/samba35/distinfo samba35/distinfo
|--- /usr/ports/net/samba35/distinfo    2010-11-15 07:29:21.000000000 -0500
|+++ samba35/distinfo   2011-06-01 18:34:50.000000000 -0400
--------------------------
Patching file distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -urN /usr/ports/net/samba35/files/sernet.patch samba35/files/sernet.patch
|--- /usr/ports/net/samba35/files/sernet.patch  2010-10-25 22:41:58.000000000
-0400
|+++ samba35/files/sernet.patch 2011-06-01 18:43:00.000000000 -0400
--------------------------
Patching file files/sernet.patch using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 1.
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to files/sernet.patch.rej
Hmm...  Ignoring the trailing garbage.
done





If I try to install samba i have this errors:


===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/net/samba35/files/sernet.patch
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
2 out of 2 hunks ignored--saving rejects to source3/passdb/pdb_ldap.c.rej
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba35.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/samba35.
